kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

test.name: TC-API-02

kw.name: Open Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens the application

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Register With Valid Credentials
kw.doc: Test case to verify login with valid credentials @

kw.name: Get Customer Id
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Getting the customer id of the logged in user @

kw.name: Get all Accounts of Customer
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bank, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12878/accounts status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 08:36:34 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e972526c959a07-FRA'} body=[{"id":14343,"customerId":12878,"type":"CHECKING","balance":115.50},{"id":14787,"customerId":12878,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":14898,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15231,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15564,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

Create Session

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12878/accounts status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 08:36:35 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e9725b69aec0b5-FRA'} body=[{"id":14343,"customerId":12878,"type":"CHECKING","balance":115.50},{"id":14787,"customerId":12878,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":14898,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15231,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15564,"customerId":12878,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Exit For Loop
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Account ${Account_Id} was not found in API response.x
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Checking if the account id is present in the list of accounts @

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application

test.doc: Test to get the customerId of the user
